User.title: User Profile
User.description: Information stored when a user signs up for BUBUBAI ID

avatar.description: Custom high-contrast vector profile avatar URL or data URI

hasGeneratedAvatar.description: Flag representing if the user has already consumed their single custom avatar generation slot

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this user record was registered

Chat.title: Chat Session
Chat.description: Ongoing conversation history for BuBuBai assistant

userId.description: Firebase Auth UID of the owning user

title.description: The friendly generated title based on first query

messages.description: Array of messages containing role, content, and timestamp keys

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the chat was started

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the chat was last active

users/{userId}.description: Secure master registry for Bububai authenticated users

chats/{chatId}.description: Secure list of code generation and text chats for users, auto-cleaned after 24 hours
